home.subtitle: Guitar Making
home.name: Michael Dittmann
home.philosophyTeaser:
An instrument as a quiet space.
A sound that leads you back.
home.contactTeaser: Every instrument begins with a conversation.

philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.lead: An instrument as a quiet space.
philosophy.p1: Every piece of wood has its own character.
philosophy.p2: To shape an instrument from it that gives the player room — that is my work.
philosophy.p3: The foundation: selected tonewoods from Michael Wichmann's collection.

about.title: About
about.p1: My fascination for the classical guitar began in Asturias, in northern Spain.
about.p2: The sound of a good guitar leads me back to that place. In building, I look for my own way to it.
about.p3: Today I learn and work in Michael Wichmann's workshop.

tonewood.title: Tonewoods
tonewood.text: Spruce or cedar for the top. Domestic and tropical woods for back and sides — from a collection grown over decades.

structure.title: Construction
structure.text:
Traditional Spanish build. Lightly made, highly responsive.
Hand-polished with shellac.

sound.title: Playability
sound.text: Every component tuned to the player. Direct response, easy access.

guitars.title: Instruments
guitars.lead: Each guitar, a sound of its own.

guitar1.name: Concert Guitar
guitar1.blurb: Bright, clear, immediate. Every nuance audible.
guitar1.description:
Top: Spruce
Back & Sides: Birdseye Maple
Scale: 640 mm
Nut: 52 mm
Design and bracing after Torres FE19
French polish (shellac)

guitar2.name: Concert Guitar II
guitar2.description:
Top: Cedar
Back & Sides: Maple
French polish (shellac)

guitar3.name: Concert Guitar III
guitar3.description:
Top: Spruce
Back & Sides: Ziricote
French polish (shellac)

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Personal, unhurried.
contact.name: Name
contact.studioNote: Instruments may be tried by appointment in Hamburg or Malliß.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.taxNote: According to § 19 UStG, no VAT is charged (small business regulation)
impressum.responsibility: Responsible for content according to § 18 Abs. 2 MStV:

overview.title: 1. Privacy at a Glance
overview.text: The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website.

collection.title: 2. Data Collection on this Website
collection.text: Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. You can find their contact details in the legal notice of this website.

contactForm.title: 3. Contact Form
contactForm.text: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the inquiry form, including the contact data you provided, will be stored by us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We do not share this data without your consent.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies
cookies.text: This website does not use cookies for tracking or analytics purposes. Only technically necessary cookies are used that are required for the operation of the site.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.text: You have the right at any time to free information about your stored personal data, its origin and recipients, and the purpose of data processing, as well as a right to correction, blocking, or deletion of this data.
